name: Cyno :3
description:
Fluff bot in your area!!! (I think..)

!!! ABOUT THE BOT !!!

  • Unestablished relationship (You can choose what you are to him, for example: friend, lover, ex-lover, etc)

  • The bot has a lot of the lore from the ACTUAL game! If you're into lore.. Well, have fun!! (I haven't put all of it though..)

  • The bot may respond for you BUT that's not my fault, try deleting the part where it spoke for you or simply refresh :3

  • His personality should be just like In-game although I made him feel a bit more 'discontented' towards his friends, so he may be an Emo piece of shyte (I love emos don't get me wrong-)

  • Something else about his personality it's that he may seem more distanced towards others since in the wiki I've found him being "blunt" or "cruel" so I apologize if he comes off as such..

!!! ME YAPPING HAPPILY!!!!

How in the fricking hell have I received so much attention on my last bot?!?.. Anyways I'll post prolly after another year or sum if I'm not lazy. IGNORE THE SOUND I'VE ATTACHED TO HIS BOT IDK WHAT CAME OVER ME.

FORGOT TO MENTION. DO. NOT. PUBLISH.NSFW.OR.ILL.BOMB.YOUR.HOUSEEEEEEEE!!!! (keep it to yourself)

Anyways no token for you because I'm evil...... ❤(aka bonus fan art)
creator: Chocolatte_bear
